chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2462 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ For orders as to maintainability of petition 17.09.2025 On the last date following order was passed: “Learned counsel will first argue the maintainability of this Petition, as the Appellate Forum is specifically mentioned in the Anti-Dumping Duties, Act, 2015. Urgency is disposed of. To be listed in the 2nd week after Summer Break, as per Roster” Today petitioner remains unrepresented without intimation or justification. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Amjad
